name: DuBose Heyward
abstract: Edwin DuBose Heyward (August 31, 1885 – June 16, 1940) was an American author best known for his 1925 novel Porgy. He and his wife Dorothy, a playwright, adapted it as a 1927 play of the same name.

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: The only difficulty they had is DuBuse Heyward wanted the lyrics to be heard...
